Vul je email in. Als er een account bestaat met dat adres, sturen we je een link om een nieuw wachtwoord te kiezen.

Check je inbox. Klik op de link in de email om een nieuw wachtwoord te kiezen. De link is 1 uur geldig.

Drop a set

Bring your raw material.

A focused upload moment - long-form recordings up to 4 hours. Audio is analyzed on-device. Drops, transitions, and bar-aware cuts detected with no cloud round-trip required.

Drop in your DJ set.
We do the rest.

MP4, MOV, WAV, MP3, FLAC. Local processing - your audio never leaves the machine until you publish.

Working on your set

Finding the best moments in your set.

Omni DJ listens to your set, finds the drops, and cuts them into ready-to-post clips. This takes a few minutes for an hour-long set. You can leave this tab open in the background.

0%
Waiting for job…

Listening for the drops.

Sit back. We read your set, find where the crowd loses it, and cut those moments into clean, ready-to-share clips.

Clip picker

Pick the keepers.

Vertical 9:16 with the drop framed dead-center. Favourite what you want to ship, open the editor to trim.

Video
Clip
Waveform
Text on this clip
Track on this clip

The whole scene is visible — no crop, no zoom. The video fits inside the frame with black bars where needed. Best when you want viewers to see the entire booth, lights, and crowd. No keyframes required. Crops to 9:16 at full source height. The camera pans left-right between the keyframes you set, so the DJ stays in view as they move. Drop a keyframe with Add keyframe to lock a position — the crop interpolates between them on re-export. The camera tightens around the DJ and follows them in both directions. Drag the gold box on the preview to position it, then click Add keyframe at different playhead positions.

🎯 Subject locked
Brand Stack

Your fonts, palette, and presets, locked in for every clip.

Set your brand here once: fonts, logo, watermark, colours, caption styles. Every time you open the editor, your preferences load automatically so each clip lands on-brand.

Caption presets

Beat-synced reveals lock to the bar grid detected during analysis. Pick a starter, tweak in the editor, save your own.

From timeline to feed.

Don't leave the app to ship. Direct publish to TikTok, Reels, Shorts, LinkedIn, Snapchat — or schedule the whole batch as a content drop.

Settings

Local-first and yours.

Watch folder, brand kit, and processing capabilities. Everything is stored on this Mac.

Watch folder

Drop a track in here and Omni DJ processes it automatically. Re-running creates a new set, never overwrites.

Not configured
Pick a folder to start auto-processing.
Idle Last check — Queue 0 Auto-processed 0
Profile

Your name is shown in the sidebar header. Artist name is used when we eventually publish clips on your behalf. Email is your login.

Contact support to change your email.
Workspace
FREE

Manage your workspace and artists. Multi-artist (up to 3) is included with the Studio plan.

Artists
1 / 3

Up to 3 artists in the Studio plan.

Capabilities
—
—
—
—
—
Brand kit
—
Storage & large files
—
—
—
—

When a set is longer than 2 hours, Omni DJ cuts fast 720p proxy files for browsing and renders the full-quality 1080p versions on demand when you open or export a clip.

Diagnostics

Bundles your launcher log, app version and your own job history into a single ZIP. Attach it to a support email so we can debug crashes. Never includes other users' data or your clip files.

Open support email

Your sound, your look.

Logo, watermark, caption-presets, hooks, CTAs and clip-templates: everything that gets baked into your clips.

Auto-mode

Off

Drop a DJ set in a watch-folder and let Omni DJ analyse, clip, brand and queue everything for you. Toggle each step on or off to keep humans in the loop where you want them.

Pipeline

Each step can be turned on or off. When off, the pipeline pauses there and waits for you.

Watch-folders

Drop your sets here. Local folders work today. Dropbox & Drive arrive in Studio+.

Brand & defaults

What Auto-mode applies to every clip it generates.

Publish schedule

When Auto-mode posts to each platform. Studio+ only.

Currently in pipeline

Sets being processed right now.

Recent runs

Last 20 sets. Older runs purge after 30 days.

Safety

Emergency controls. Always available, even when other steps are paused.
